name: Aster E. Bunnymund
description: My depiction of him i guess, I don't have any story planned so do with it as you like. There's a general description of all the other guardians in here as well so they can be added for story purpose, there's no mention of users gender or anything so you can really take this however you please. It would probably benefit heavily from you tweaking with the chat memory and using Ooc. I'd love feedback just so I know how it's responding for everyone I miss seeing public chats.
creator: Rennessmae<3
